prompt: I need a settings form for a Next.js app using shadcn/ui. It should have: a text input for display name, an email input, a select dropdown for language (English, Spanish, French, Japanese), a switch for email notifications, and a checkbox for agreeing to terms. Use React Hook Form with Zod validation - name required min 2 chars, email required valid format, language required, terms must be checked. Show validation errors inline. Add a submit button that logs the form data.
assertions: Uses shadcn/ui Form, FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormMessage components
Imports from @/components/ui/ paths, not directly from @base-ui/react for form elements
Uses zodResolver with a Zod schema for validation
Includes Select component from shadcn/ui (not raw Base UI Select)
Has 'use client' directive at the top
